title: Fast Food Worker

rationales.taskAutomation: Order-taking, order routing, and following standardized assembly steps are scripted work; AI drive-thru voice ordering already performs the ordering half end-to-end.
rationales.toolMaturity: AI voice-ordering systems are live in production at major chains, alongside mature kiosk and app-ordering technology.
rationales.adoption: Major fast-food chains have adopted AI drive-thru ordering and kiosks at meaningful scale, spreading from pilots to standard rollout.
rationales.agenticExposure: Order intake, routing to the kitchen display, and payment form a full agent-traversable pipeline; food assembly and packaging remain manual.

tasksAtRisk: Order entry into kitchen display systems
tasksGrowing: Handling order errors and customer complaints
salarySource: BLS OES May 2024, SOC 35-3023, p25-p75 rounded

defenseSkills.skill: Working alongside AI drive-thru and kiosk ordering systems
Cross-training into shift-lead or scheduling roles

insight: AI voice ordering is already live at drive-thru windows for several national chains, taking over the exact scripted exchange this job used to require. What's left is assembly speed and handling the orders the AI gets wrong.
